title: Sign off rank-drop UI change — ADR-0001 implemented & green (dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness)
description: The approved ADR-0001 triage is now implemented and committed (28d0889, 42/42 tests green, tsc clean). One accepted item (t4) alters rendered dashboard output: KeywordTable now renders rank drops (now worse than prev) as '↓ N' in text-danger instead of collapsing them to '—'. This was explicitly approved at triage, but it is the only item that changes visible UI behavior — confirming before it reaches production. No down-move row exists in the current mock data.ts, so today's visible impact is nil; the fix is latent-correct. Autonomy is review_each_pr, so this branch waits for your merge approval. Separately, format.ts NaN behavior ($NaN / NaN%) was deliberately PINNED in tests, not guarded, per the t5 decision — flagging in case product later wants a display guard.

title: Code Review verdict: APPROVE — ADR-0001 @ 28d0889 (cr-f1 resolved; 3 latent follow-ups)
description: Re-review after the ADR-0001 triage-approval was fanned out to a fresh implementation and re-committed as 28d0889 (prior 199409b gone — workspace reset). Verified against the live tree: 42/42 tests green, tsc clean, gating rank-drop defect (cr-f1) fixed and intact, changeset correctly scoped to ADR-0001 (ADR-0002 files left untracked). Verdict APPROVE. The t4 UI change renders rank drops as '↓ N' in red — correct, no down-move row in current mock data so no visible change today. Three format.ts items are pre-existing, latent (zero call sites), and pinned in tests — follow-up backlog before live-data wiring.

title: Security re-scan — 2 Medium findings STILL OPEN (local-seo-agency @ 28d0889) — 7th scan
description: Re-scan at 28d0889 confirms both prior Medium findings remain unremediated (package.json overrides=NONE; page.tsx:66-67 dangerouslySetInnerHTML markup unchanged). 0 new security issues. ADR-0001 rank-harness changeset is correctness-only, scanned clean. @google/generative-ai still unused. This is the 7th consecutive identical scan — strongly recommend consolidating into a single standing ticket.

title: Release v0.2.7 created locally — approve to publish + resolve recurring orphaned-tag drift
description: A PATCH release (0.2.0→0.2.7) was committed and tagged locally (commit c868c48, annotated tag v0.2.7). It fixes the keyword table hiding rank drops, adds pure rank.ts + a node --test harness (42 tests passing), and ships ADR-0001/planning docs. Versioning skipped 0.2.1–0.2.6 because those tags persist on commits orphaned by seven workspace resets. Decide whether to publish and how to resolve the recurring orphaned-tag drift.
